THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN ANGEL HERNANDEZ UMANZOR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DEFENDANT JUAN ANGEL HERNANDEZ UMANZOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. THE COURT ENTERS JUDGEMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF. THIS ORDER IS STAYED FOR TWO WEEKS UNTIL 2/14/24 TO ALLOW PARTIES TO DISCUSS A PAYMENT PLAN.
